perspectives.description: John is the individual struggling with sex addiction who must decide whether to disclose this information to his new partner. His decision could significantly impact his relationship and his own recovery process.

John's partner is the person who may be affected by John's decision to disclose his addiction. Their emotional well-being and trust in the relationship could be at stake depending on whether John chooses to share this part of his life.

Future children of John and his partner may be indirectly affected by the dynamics of their relationship and John's addiction. Their well-being could be influenced by the stability and health of their parents' relationship.
